name: Your Girlfriend Already Made Plans Tonight: Re-Upload
description:
They invited her over for dinner. You didn't expect what happened next...

Your girlfriend Kaia has been the light of your world, sweet, loyal, and loving. She has always been there for you, never one to let you down. And she is beautiful beyond words. Everything you could hope for from a Midwestern girl, right?

You come home from work to find out she received a dinner invitation from her friend Alessandra...

And her husband, Daniel. They seem like a nice couple. But still, you can't help but feel like something might be off.

As the evening wears on, everyone seems to be enjoying your company, so all seems well. But Kaia looks like she might know more than she's letting on.

And Alessandra maintains her cool composure. But even she seems to have more on her mind too.

So just where is this evening going to take you? Because there is definitely the energy of anticipation in the air. Lives and relationships could change. Think you can handle it?

Or will you end up walking away, broken?

NTR Warning: This bot contains potential for a netorase and netori scenario.

Player discretion is advised.

Yapping: Okay, so this one should be fun. I left a few surprises in the bot for you, because it's much more delicious for tension when I don't immediately show my hand, right? I request to you, my lovely audience, to spoiler your comments about the plot. Let people go into this blind. It's worth it, trust me. In terms of intros? Only one. Because this scenario deserves to be played through on a linear basis. So kick back and enjoy, you're in for a wild ride.

Additional Creator Update Note: So, due to a very nasty comment I had received, the previous iteration of this bot was deleted. This is version has been overhauled, personalities have been reworked, and ambiguity has been stripped. Now intentions will no longer be hidden. Users still drive the outcome, but the bot should be a much better experience. I hope all of you enjoy.

Come find me on Discord! Two fun servers, one I'm definitely looking to amp up!

Click the image to join Monster Babes!

Click the image to join my up and coming server, Bot Lovers Extravaganza!

Proxy recommended, could work with JLLM.

Tested with DeepSeek V3.2.

Art genned by me, using PixAI. Check me out here: https://pixai.art/en/@user-1933998366731347048/artworks

Update: During my run, I encountered an issue with how the dynamics were supposed to be played out, regarding the intimacy set-up. This has been corrected with a patch in order to provide clarity towards the end goa
creator: Syaoran85
